channel.title: Shakesphere on un01s notes
channel.description: Recent content in Shakesphere on un01s notes

item.title: the empire of liberty
item.description:
great lines from lyrics

  • And I need you more than want you, and I want you for all time. And the Wichita lineman, is still on the line. – from Wichita Lineman, by Glen Campbell

  • Jesus died for somebody’s sins but not mine – from Gloria, by Patti Smith

  • They smelt of pubs, And Wormwood Scrubs, And too many right wing meetings – Down in the tube station at midnight, by the Jam
